name: WithSecure Elements EDR
description: Integrates with WithSecure Elements API for endpoint security event monitoring, EDR incident management, device isolation, and threat detection

actions.name: List Security Events
actions.description: Retrieve security events from all managed organizations including EDR incidents

parameters.name: persistenceTimestampStart
parameters.description: Start time for the event query (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: persistenceTimestampEnd
parameters.description: End time for the event query (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: engine
parameters.description: Filter by detection engine (e.g., edr, deepGuard, reputationAndHeuristics)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, warning, informational)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

actions.name: List EDR Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve EDR incidents with filtering by time and status

parameters.name: updatedTimestampStart
parameters.description: Start time for incident updated filter (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: updatedTimestampEnd
parameters.description: End time for incident updated filter (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: exclusiveStart
parameters.description: Use exclusive start to avoid duplicate polling results

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific EDR incident

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the incident

actions.name: Update Incident
actions.description: Update an EDR incident status or add analyst notes

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the incident

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: New status (open, inProgress, resolved, falsePositive)

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Resolution type for the incident

actions.name: List Devices
actions.description: Retrieve managed devices (endpoints) with filtering options

parameters.name: protectionStatusOverview
parameters.description: Filter by protection status

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of devices to return

actions.name: Isolate Device
actions.description: Isolate a device from the network to contain a potential threat

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the device to isolate

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Reason for isolating the device

actions.name: Release Device from Isolation
actions.description: Release a previously isolated device and restore network connectivity

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the device to release

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Reason for releasing the device

actions.name: List Organizations
actions.description: List all organizations (companies) accessible with current API credentials

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of organizations to return
